item.title: HR Complaint
item.description: I have to file a complaint with my HR. I am working from home and my coworker won't stop trying to kiss me. I feel like this is incredibly inappropriate behavior for the work place. Wow... Most Viral on my first post in years. The co-worker will receive a promotion. Thanks all!
item.dc:creator: HuginnMunin

item.title: Happy Meme Monday from Litterbox! [OC]
item.description:
This week I recreated the "Kombucha Girl" meme! I feel this one so often as a parent! ? Blanks at the end for you to make your own!
By YouCanCallMeKnuckles in Litterbox Discord (Come join us at http://litterbox.gg/)
BLANK #1
BLANK #2

item.title: What Happened Today #37
item.description: The cracks keep widening: Trump shrugs off a recession, ICE revokes a protester’s green card, and Panama dumps deported migrants. Meanwhile, Musk picks fights, Iran wavers on talks, and Kristi Noem wants lie detector tests for leaks. Stay sharp. #resist #GovBriefToday New this weekend: We’ve launched email service so you never miss an issue. Sign up at govbrief.today. LINKS 1. https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/mar/09/trump-recession-trade-tariffs 2. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/panama-releases-detained-deportees-us-human-rights-criticism/ 3. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy87vg38dnpo 4. https://thehill.com/policy/international/5185211-fox-host-asks-trump-if-he-is-comfortable-that-ukraine-may-not-survive/ 5. https://apnews.com/article/columbia-university-mahmoud-khalil-ice-15014bcbb921f21a9f704d5acdcae7a8 6. https://www.palmbeachdailynews.com/story/news/trump/2025/03/09/norad-intercepts-another-pilot-near-trumps-mar-a-lago-in-palm-beach/82153462007/ 7. https://www.aol.com/trump-defends-amy-coney-barrett-015333825.html 8. https://apnews.com/article/ice-deportation-immigration-dhs-kristi-noem-leak-cf09189abaa6147a0c990225c2d27bad 9. https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/iran-would-consider-talks-with-us-about-concerns-over-militarization-nuclear-2025-03-09/ FIGHTING BACK - https://www.wlwt.com/article/pro-ukranian-protesters-heckle-vance-outside-cincinnati-home/64105291 Subscribe to Get Headlines Every Day or View Archives - https://govbrief.today

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
genius
yes
a rare occurrence
what else could it mean?
don't try this on your flatscreen
as a guy... yeah, i've done this
i would die for plant doggo
wait what
dislike
i've been attacked
try the and
crazy song
real mature
that's gotta be rough for penguins
and there you have it
mmm hmm
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: I’m the only one my wife has ever been with
item.dc:creator: Broadway2

item.title: Monday MEME PHONE CLEARING Dump (Need the space for you know what...) #831
item.description:
1
2. She legit checked if the girl is real
3
4
5
6
7
8. At that point you just delete your account
9. Me: "Death by SNU-SNU is probably not worth it" The SNU-SNU
10
11
12. Luigi Party?
13
14. The best crossover duel in history of movies
15. And finally I want to thank the 2 (Hi, Mom!) people that made it to end of the dump. I wanted to share with you that as well as browsing and posting on Imgur all day I'm also making a passion project of mine. If you liked the humor in this dump I think you will like the game too called "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse). It is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and similar in tone and features funny signs like this one here. Can you imagine? A first person game mixed with humor? https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Anyway, It would mean the world to me and my brother if you checked the game out on Steam and gave it a wishlist. It won't disappoint. I promise. Just do not press the big red button, tho.
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Who's to blame, Muskrat? Could it be you?

Maybe you should remove your stuff and get tf out of Xitter. Hit the fascist Spacekaren where it hurts.
